description: The marketing team needs a customer segmentation system based on lifetime spending in the 'demodb' database (root / GymAnything123!). Add a property named 'CustomerTier' (STRING) to the 'Profiles' class and update it for every profile based on total spending calculated by summing the 'Price' of connected 'Orders' via the 'HasOrder' edge. Use the following segmentation rules: 'Platinum' for spending > 3000, 'Gold' for spending between 1000 and 3000 inclusive, and 'Silver' for spending < 1000 or no orders. Export a JSON list of all Platinum customers containing their 'Name', 'Surname', 'Email', and 'CustomerTier' to /home/ga/platinum_customers.json.
